Protecting What You Built — No Matter What It Takes.

Divorce is not just the end of a marriage. For high-net-worth individuals and business owners in Los Angeles, it is a complex financial, legal, and personal reckoning that can reshape everything from your company's ownership structure to your children's futures. At Hargrove & Associates, we represent clients for whom the stakes of divorce are not ordinary.

High-Conflict Family Law Matters

  • ■ High-asset divorce — real estate, business interests, investment portfolios
  • ■ Spousal support / alimony disputes and modifications
  • ■ Complex child custody and visitation agreements
  • ■ Business valuation and asset tracing
  • ■ Prenuptial and postnuptial agreement enforcement and challenges
  • ■ Post-judgment modifications and enforcement
  • ■ Domestic violence restraining orders — protective and defensive
"We believe that the quality of your legal representation should match the value of what you are protecting. A high-assets divorce is not the place for a generalist."

A Note on Discretion

Absolute confidentiality is a condition of our representation — not a promise. Hargrove & Associates has represented public figures, executives, and prominent families across Los Angeles with complete discretion, and we will extend the same to you.

SPEAK WITH A DIVORCE ATTORNEY TODAY →
